sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85389" key="polusfairi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-σφαιρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">multiplication of spheres,</tr_> Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:p.201" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.201</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
